definitions.es: después; más tarde en el tiempo.
definitions.vi: sau; muộn hơn trong thời gian.

example.vi: Tôi sẽ đến sau bữa tối.

exampleSentences: Em học bài sau bữa tối.
Anh rửa bát sau bữa ăn.
Chị gặp em sau buổi học.
sentenceBreakdowns: Em (I) + học (study) + bài (lessons) + sau (after) + bữa (meal) + tối (evening)
Anh (he) + rửa (wash) + bát (dishes) + sau (after) + bữa (meal) + ăn (meal)
Chị (she) + gặp (meet) + em (me) + sau (after) + buổi (session) + học (class)
notes:
sau means after — something happens later in time than something else.

It goes before a noun or time phrase to show sequence. You’ll also see sau khi + clause to mean “after doing something.” As an adverb, sau đó means “after that.”

Opposite idea: trước = before — nice mental pair: trước ↔ sau.
notes_md:
**sau** means **after** — something happens later in time than something else.

It goes **before a noun or time phrase** to show sequence. You’ll also see **sau khi + clause** to mean “after doing something.” As an adverb, **sau đó** means “after that.”


Opposite idea: **trước** = before — nice mental pair: *trước ↔ sau*.
exampleSentencesTranslated: He washes dishes after the meal.
